stories.title: Angry Venezuelans accuse government of negligence over earthquake response
stories.summary: People in areas devastated by twin earthquakes say they need more support from the government.

stories.title: Manhunt after bomb injures Ukrainian oligarch in Monaco
stories.summary: The blast was caused by an explosive device which appeared to contain bolts and pellets, the head of Monaco's government said.

stories.title: US envoys in Doha to meet mediators but not Iranians, Qatar says
stories.summary: Qatar's foreign ministry spokesman says no high-level meetings or direct talks between the US and Iran are scheduled.

stories.title: Thousands of anti-migrant protesters march in South Africa amid heavy police presence
stories.summary: Thousands of people have already left South Africa ahead of the deadline set by anti-migrant groups.

stories.title: Founder of Asian super-app Gojek sentenced to years in jail for corruption
stories.summary: The case against Gojek founder Nadiem Makarim relates to a laptop deal made during his term as Indonesia's education minister.

stories.title: Flooding hits Ghana's capital killing 13 people - with another storm forecast
stories.summary: People have been urged to relocate to high ground or stay indoors as more rain is expected to come.

stories.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
stories.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.

stories.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
stories.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

stories.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
stories.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

stories.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk
stories.summary: Gain insight on Experian, SoFi Technologies and more in the latest Market Talks covering Financial Services.

stories.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
stories.summary: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia.

stories.title: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
stories.summary: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.

stories.title: Do you really, really love your job? Then you're not alone, according to surprising results from this survey
stories.summary: Those surveyed showed a 78.9% rate of workers who "reported feeling positive at the end of their shifts."

stories.title: China widens Japan export curbs, targeting drone makers, nuclear firms and defense institutes
stories.summary: China blacklisted four of Japan's government defense research institutes and placed dozens more Japanese firms under tightened export restrictions Monday.

stories.title: Shipping rebounds in Strait of Hormuz one week after U.S.-Iran deal – but fragile confidence threatens recovery
stories.summary: Shipping traffic through the strategically vital Strait of Hormuz is recovering one week after the U.S. and Iran signed an interim peace deal.

stories.title: UN agency pauses Hormuz ship evacuation plan after first vessel attack under peace deal
stories.summary: The pause follows a container ship being struck near the coast of Oman on Thursday, with a U.S. official saying that Iran was responsible for the attack.

stories.title: Core inflation rate hit 3.4% in May, highest since October 2023, Fed’s preferred gauge shows
stories.summary: The personal consumption expenditures price index was expected to show a 4.1% annual increase.

stories.title: Trump pledges rapid U.S. response for Venezuela after historic earthquakes kill hundreds
stories.summary: The swift U.S. offer of assistance reflects a degree of diplomatic realignment between the Trump administration and the Venezuelan interim government.

stories.title: Ars Live, today: The latest on the aftermath of the New Glenn catastrophe
stories.summary: Join us on the livestream at 1 pm ET and ask questions about the aftermath of New Glenn.

stories.title: US offers $10 million for info on group behind Signal and WhatsApp hacking spree
stories.summary: Operation by two Russia-state groups has been ongoing since at least March.

stories.title: South Korea to spend $1T on more memory chip production and humanoid robots
stories.summary: South Korea targets physical AI lead and commercial humanoid robots by 2028.

stories.title: US renewable boom passes key milestone in April
stories.summary: Small-scale solar helped renewables hit nearly triple coal's generation in the US.

stories.title: Supreme Court ruling guts government’s use of geofence warrants
stories.summary: SCOTUS falls short of deeming geofence warrants unconstitutional, though.

stories.title: Sony erases digital content from libraries; we're reminded we don’t own what we buy
stories.summary: Sony has been scaling down its digitial store for a few years.

stories.title: MetaMask launches stablecoin yield account with card spending
stories.summary: MetaMask launches Money Account it says offers up to 4% variable APY on mUSD stablecoin balances and card spending, with DeFi-powered yield via vaults, excluding the UK and EU.

stories.title: OKX launches AI marketplace for autonomous agent economy
stories.summary: OKX launched a beta marketplace for the agentic economy, enabling AI agents to autonomously find work and collaborate with other agents.

stories.title: Strategy's new plan divides industry observers even as MSTR, STRC climb
stories.summary: Strategy’s new Bitcoin capital framework draws Wall Street backing from Benchmark with a $570 per share target even as traders question long-term demand risk.

stories.title: Theo becomes first crypto-native investor in Fidelity tokenized fund
stories.summary: The onchain capital markets platform allocated $20 million to Fidelity International's tokenized liquidity fund as tokenized Treasury products continue to attract institutional capital.

stories.title: Swan's Cory Klippsten sees record Bitcoin holder supply revealing early bottom
stories.summary: The record Bitcoin supply held by long-term holders may suggest that the crypto market bottom will come early, according to Swan’s Cory Klippsten.

stories.title: StarkWare unveils Starknet quantum roadmap, says industry has no excuse
stories.summary: “The crypto industry shouldn’t need wake-up calls from the White House or anyone else,” said StarkWare CEO Eli Ben-Sasson.

stories.summary: Aging may trigger the appearance of specialized stem cells that supercharge the body's ability to create new belly fat. The discovery reveals a potential biological driver of middle-age weight gain and a promising t

stories.title: Osteopenia is silently weakening bones in millions of people

stories.title: Lily Allen defends tour after some fans criticise show length
stories.summary: Some fans had complained that the show is too short because the singer only performs her latest album.

stories.title: Signed Paul McCartney book found in charity shop sells for nearly £1,000
stories.summary: The book signed by the Beatles' star sat in an Oxfam stop for months before the manager found it.

stories.title: School trip surprise as students meet The Rock
stories.summary: About 50 children from Sudbury meet Dwayne Johnson on a school visit to London.

stories.title: Brother of TV star Caroline Flack dies
stories.summary: Paul Flack, 55, was pronounced dead at the Norfolk and Norwich Hospital on 21 June, an inquest hears.

stories.title: Lilo & Stitch star Daveigh Chase's cause of death was Aids
stories.summary: The actress, who also crawled out of a TV in horror film The Ring, passed away in LA this month, aged 35.

stories.title: Tributes paid to 'comic genius' Penelope Keith after her death aged 86
stories.summary: The beloved actress was known for roles in classic TV sitcoms The Good Life and To the Manor Born.
